name: shell-layout
title: Application Shell Layout
description: The root app shell: a flex column at full viewport height (alert-banner > topbar > subbar > body-row) whose body row pairs the icon sidebar, an optional slide-in dashboard panel, and the main content/canvas. Layout-only surface — each region is a labelled dashed slot placeholder that names the plane it frames, with per-region surface tints (--nav/--bg) hinting at the real chrome. Owns one behaviour: the dashboard-panel toggle, mirroring the live togglePanel() / .shell.panelopen interaction, with hover, focus-visible and disabled states.
